languages.text: Неизвестный напал на медикариев Сектора Бионика, взял заложника и требует разговора с Вольным Торговцем. Нужно срочно спуститься в медицинский отсек.

An unknown assailant has attacked the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, taken a hostage, and is demanding to speak to the Rogue Trader. The Lord Captain must descend to the medicae facility immediately.
languages.original_text: Неизвестный напал на медикариев Сектора Бионика, взял заложника и требует разговора с Вольным Торговцем. Нужно срочно спуститься в медицинский отсек.

traits.locale_text: An unknown assailant has attacked the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, taken a hostage, and is demanding to speak to the Rogue Trader. The Lord Captain must descend to the medbay immediately.

An unknown assailant has attacked the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, taken a hostage, and is demanding to speak to the Rogue Trader. The Lord Captain must descend to the medbay immediately.

languages.text: 一名身份不明的袭击者对仿生区的医务官发起了攻击，挟持了一名人质，并要求面见行商浪人。舰长大人必须即刻前往医疗设施处。
languages.original_text: An unknown assailant has attacked the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, taken a hostage, and is demanding to speak to the Rogue Trader. The Lord Captain must descend to the medicae facility immediately.

traits.locale_text: 一名身份不明的袭击者对仿生区的医务官发起了攻击，挟持了一名人质，并要求面见行商浪人。舰长大人必须即刻前往医疗设施处。

languages.text: Un asaltante desconocido ha atacado a los oficiales medicae del Sector Bionica y secuestrado a un rehén; ahora exige hablar con el Comerciante Independiente. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán debe descender a la instalación medicae de inmediato.
languages.original_text: An unknown assailant has attacked the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, taken a hostage, and is demanding to speak to the Rogue Trader. The Lord Captain must descend to the medicae facility immediately.

traits.locale_text: Un asaltante desconocido ha atacado a los oficiales medicae del Sector Bionica y secuestrado a un rehén; ahora exige hablar con el Comerciante Independiente. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán debe descender a la instalación medicae de inmediato.

languages.text: Une force inconnue a attaqué les officiers de medicae dans le secteur Bionica, pris un otage et exige de s'entretenir avec {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} doit immédiatement se rendre à l'installation de medicae.
languages.original_text: An unknown assailant has attacked the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, taken a hostage, and is demanding to speak to the Rogue Trader. The Lord Captain must descend to the medicae facility immediately.

traits.locale_text: Une force inconnue a attaqué les officiers de medicae dans le secteur Bionica, pris un otage et exige de s'entretenir avec {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} doit immédiatement se rendre à l'installation de medicae.

languages.text: Bilinmeyen bir saldırgan, Sektör Biyonika'daki sıhhiye subaylarına saldırıp bir kişiyi rehin aldı ve Hür Tacir ile konuşmayı talep ediyor. Lord Kaptan derhâl sıhhiye tesisine inmeli.
languages.original_text: An unknown assailant has attacked the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, taken a hostage, and is demanding to speak to the Rogue Trader. The Lord Captain must descend to the medicae facility immediately.

traits.locale_text: Bilinmeyen bir saldırgan, Sektör Biyonika'daki sıhhiye subaylarına saldırıp bir kişiyi rehin aldı ve Hür Tacir ile konuşmayı talep ediyor. Lord Kaptan derhâl sıhhiye tesisine inmeli.

languages.text: Ein unbekannter Angreifer hat die Medicae-Offiziere in Sektor Bionica attackiert und eine Geisel genommen. Nun verlangt er, mit {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} zu sprechen. Der Lord Captain muss sich sofort zur Medicae-Einrichtung begeben.
languages.original_text: An unknown assailant has attacked the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, taken a hostage, and is demanding to speak to the Rogue Trader. The Lord Captain must descend to the medicae facility immediately.

traits.locale_text: Ein unbekannter Angreifer hat die Medicae-Offiziere in Sektor Bionica attackiert und eine Geisel genommen. Nun verlangt er, mit {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} zu sprechen. Der Lord Captain muss sich sofort zur Medicae-Einrichtung begeben.

languages.text: セクター・ビオニカで、何者かが医療官を襲撃し、人質をとり、ローグ・トレーダーと話すことを要求している。ロード・キャプテンはすぐにメディベイに降りる必要がある。
languages.original_text: An unknown assailant has attacked the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, taken a hostage, and is demanding to speak to the Rogue Trader. The Lord Captain must descend to the medbay immediately.

traits.locale_text: セクター・ビオニカで、何者かが医療官を襲撃し、人質をとり、ローグ・トレーダーと話すことを要求している。ロード・キャプテンはすぐにメディベイに降りる必要がある。
